name: gwind-v2
description: Gwind Design Tokens v2 - Optimized for Tailwind CSS v4
author: Fatich Imam Al Arasy

scripts.build:css: npx tsx scripts/generate-css.ts && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles/styles.css -o dist/gwind.css --minify && mkdir -p dist/styles && cp src/styles/base.css dist/styles/base.css && cp src/styles/theme.css dist/styles/theme.css
